ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Dec-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:43am and concludig 9:52am.

Plaintiffs Elise Omaaits, Darynee Blount, Elaine Rodriguez, Jared Von Halle, Jesse Southworth, Louis Cappone, Mason Preston, Nicha Cuberatch, Rhiannon Cook, and Yetunde Duro-Emanuel appearing through counsel Cassidy Clark via zoom.
Defendant Spora Health, Inc. and Dan Miller not appearing.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's request for interest and it's justification for attorney fees.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.
Court examines Plaintiffs CASSIDY CLARK & JARED VON HALLE and she confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiffs and their Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiffs Elise Omaaits, Darynee Blount, Elaine Rodriguez, Jared Von Halle, Jesse Southworth, Louis Cappone, Mason Preston, Nicha Cuberatch, Rhiannon Cook, and Yetunde Duro-Emanuel, and against Defendants Spora Health, Inc. and Dan Miller, as follows:

Damages: $437,057.60
Prejudgment Interest: $25,800.00
Attorney Fees: $105,761.50
Costs: $4,052.21
Waiting Time Penalty: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $572,671.31

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.
